body: Hi nikita, I came across an SDE opening at Cybaem Tech Pvt Ltd. I have 1+ years of experience and would love a referral. Could I share my resume?

subject: Referral request for full stack developer at tcs
body:
Hi nikita,

I hope you're doing well. I noticed an opening for full stack developer at tcs. Based on my background, I believe I'd be a strong fit.

Would you be open to referring me?

Thanks,
Your Name
